The 'Dependency Injection' layer facilitates communication between the UI and Data layers within the client.  Data flows from the DataSources to the Repositories, then to the State Holders, and finally to the Screens in the UI layer.  The API Gateway acts as an intermediary, handling requests from the client and responses from the Backend and CDN.",width:"662",height:"538"})}),`
